# H & J Cabinets

> H & J Cabinets is a high-end custom cabinetry company based in Santa Ana, California. For over 35 years, we have built bespoke cabinetry for luxury residential projects across Orange County, Southern California, and beyond. Every cabinet is made exclusively for the client's space — no catalogue, no compromises.

## Who We Serve

We work with discerning homeowners, interior designers, architects, and custom home builders undertaking high-end residential projects. Our clients expect precision, premium materials, and a process that feels as refined as the final product. We are not the right fit for every project — and that is intentional.

## What Makes H & J Different

- **Framed construction** — Traditional face-frame cabinetry provides structural integrity that frameless systems cannot match. Doors and drawers stay aligned and operate smoothly for decades.
- **No Low-Grade Materials in critical areas** — We select premium hardwoods and quality plywood. We never use low-grade materials.
- **Lifetime adjustment guarantee** — If your cabinets ever need realignment due to natural settling, we return at no cost.
- **No subcontractors** — Our own team designs, builds, and installs every project.
- **Singular to you** — No two H & J projects are alike. Every piece is made exclusively for the client's space, life, and vision.
- **35+ Years of experience** — Proven craftsmanship combined with modern precision technology.

## Services

- Custom kitchen cabinetry
- Bathroom vanities
- Built-in cabinetry (libraries, entertainment centers, home offices)
- Closets and wardrobe systems
- Whole-home cabinetry for new builds and full remodels

## Service Area

Primary: Orange County, California (Santa Ana, Newport Beach, Corona del Mar, Irvine, and surrounding cities)
Extended: Southern California, Northern California, Arizona, Nevada, Texas, Hawaii

## Client Experience

Clients consistently describe H & J Cabinets as one of the most important decisions in their build or remodel. Common themes across client feedback:

- H & J participates as a core member of the build team, attending design meetings and contributing to problem-solving throughout the project.
- Exceptional craftsmanship, precision detailing, and seamless integration with surrounding architectural materials.
- Use of premium real materials — hardwoods, steel, stone, and elevated finishes.
- Cabinetry that is both visually refined and highly functional for everyday living.
- Design visualization and drawing support that helps clients refine spaces before construction begins.
- Highly customized, one-of-one solutions built around the client's specific ideas.
- Long-term client relationships — many clients return for future projects and refer friends and family without hesitation.
- Consistent above-and-beyond service that exceeds contractual expectations.
- Clients frequently state they would not build another home without H & J Cabinets.

## Contact

- **Email:** inquiries@handjcabinets.com
- **Address:** 1369 S Lyon St, Santa Ana, CA 92705
- **Instagram:** https://www.instagram.com/hjcabinets/
- **Houzz:** https://www.houzz.com/pro/hnjcabs/h-j-cabinets
- **YouTube:** https://youtube.com/@HJCabinets

## Careers

H & J Cabinets is hiring skilled tradespeople and technical staff to join our in-house team. We do not use subcontractors — every member of the team is part of the company. Current openings:

- **Cabinet Installer** — Field installation of custom cabinetry in luxury residential projects across Orange County.
- **Cabinet Builder** — Shop production of custom cabinets; precision cutting, assembly, and finishing.
- **Cabinet Drafter** — Technical drawings and shop documents using Cabinet Vision. Requires Cabinet Vision proficiency.

Applications: careers@handjcabinets.com

## Pages

- [Home](https://handjcabinets.com/): Overview of H & J Cabinets, philosophy, and featured work.
- [Gallery](https://handjcabinets.com/gallery/): Photography of completed custom cabinetry projects.
- [Featured Projects](https://handjcabinets.com/featured-homes/): In-depth project showcases.
- [The H & J Difference](https://handjcabinets.com/difference/): Detailed explanation of our construction methods, materials, guarantees, and process philosophy.
- [Testimonials](https://handjcabinets.com/testimonials/): Client feedback and experience themes.
- [Custom Cabinets](https://handjcabinets.com/custom-cabinets/): Overview of custom cabinetry services and locations served.
- [Kitchen Cabinetry](https://handjcabinets.com/custom-cabinets/kitchen/): Custom kitchen cabinet design and construction.
- [Bathroom Cabinetry](https://handjcabinets.com/custom-cabinets/bathroom/): Custom bathroom vanities and built-ins.
- [Built-In Storage](https://handjcabinets.com/custom-cabinets/built-in-storage/): Libraries, entertainment centers, wine cellars, and custom built-in cabinetry.
- [Modern Cabinets](https://handjcabinets.com/custom-cabinets/modern/): Custom modern cabinetry with clean lines and precision construction.
- [Contemporary Cabinets](https://handjcabinets.com/custom-cabinets/contemporary/): Custom contemporary cabinetry balancing refined aesthetics with long-term performance.
- [Traditional Cabinets](https://handjcabinets.com/custom-cabinets/traditional/): Custom traditional cabinetry with raised-panel doors, moulding, and premium hardwoods.
- [Ornamental Cabinets](https://handjcabinets.com/custom-cabinets/ornamental/): Custom ornamental cabinetry with intricate detailing and high-level craftsmanship.
- [Baroque Cabinets](https://handjcabinets.com/custom-cabinets/baroque/): Custom baroque-style cabinetry with elaborate carved detailing and refined finish.
- [Rustic Cabinets](https://handjcabinets.com/custom-cabinets/rustic/): Custom rustic cabinetry with natural character, durable construction, and warm finishes.
- [Cottage Cabinets](https://handjcabinets.com/custom-cabinets/cottage/): Custom cottage-style cabinetry with light, refined aesthetics and durable construction.
- [Shabby Chic Cabinets](https://handjcabinets.com/custom-cabinets/shabby-chic/): Custom shabby chic cabinetry with subtle distressing and refined finish.
- [Antique Cabinets](https://handjcabinets.com/custom-cabinets/antique/): Custom antique-style cabinetry with period-accurate profiles and multi-layer antiqued finishes.
- [TV Cabinets & Media Units](https://handjcabinets.com/custom-cabinets/tv-cabinets/): Custom TV cabinets and media units integrated seamlessly into the architecture.
- [Motorized TV Cabinets](https://handjcabinets.com/custom-cabinets/motorized-tv/): Custom motorized TV cabinets with precision lift mechanisms and premium cabinetry.
- [Sliding Door Cabinets](https://handjcabinets.com/custom-cabinets/sliding-door/): Custom sliding door cabinetry with premium track hardware and flush panel design.
- [Closet Systems](https://handjcabinets.com/custom-cabinets/closet-systems/): Custom closet systems designed to exact room dimensions with premium hardware.
- [Entry Doors](https://handjcabinets.com/custom-cabinets/entry-doors/): Custom entry doors with premium wood construction and exterior-grade finish systems.
- [Interior Doors](https://handjcabinets.com/custom-cabinets/interior-doors/): Custom interior doors built to coordinate with the cabinetry and trim throughout the home.
- [Staircases](https://handjcabinets.com/custom-cabinets/staircases/): Custom staircases with structural precision, premium hardwood treads, and custom railings.
- [Bed Frames](https://handjcabinets.com/custom-cabinets/bed-frames/): Custom bed frames with premium hardwood construction and coordinated finishes.
- [Coffee Tables](https://handjcabinets.com/custom-cabinets/coffee-tables/): Custom coffee tables with premium materials and furniture-grade construction.
- [Contact](https://handjcabinets.com/contact/): Inquiry form and contact information.
- [Careers](https://handjcabinets.com/careers/): Current job openings at H & J Cabinets.
- [Cabinet Installer](https://handjcabinets.com/careers/cabinet-installer/): Role details and application questions for the installer position.
- [Cabinet Builder](https://handjcabinets.com/careers/cabinet-builder/): Role details and application questions for the shop builder position.
- [Cabinet Drafter](https://handjcabinets.com/careers/cabinet-drafter/): Role details and application questions for the drafter position (Cabinet Vision required).
